criteria.name: Text Generation Core
criteria.question: Does the product's primary value come from generating, editing, or summarizing text or documents?
criteria.quote: E1: tasks where LLM access could reduce time by 50%+ for text generation, writing, and document creation

criteria.name: Written Communication Facilitation
criteria.question: Does the product primarily facilitate written customer communication such as email, chat, or messaging workflows?
criteria.quote: AI assistance improved productivity most in written communication tasks and customer service interactions

criteria.name: Information Synthesis Function
criteria.question: Does the product's core function involve synthesizing, organizing, or retrieving information from knowledge bases or documents?
criteria.quote: Generative AI enables workers to perform information synthesis and knowledge retrieval more efficiently

criteria.name: Routine Cognitive Task Automation
criteria.question: Does the product automate routine, codifiable cognitive tasks such as data entry, form processing, or standard classification?
criteria.quote: Automatable tasks are characterized by codifiability and routine cognitive procedures separable from complex judgment

criteria.name: Classification and Categorization
criteria.question: Does the product primarily perform classification, tagging, categorization, or pattern matching on text or structured data?
criteria.quote: E1 exposure includes tasks involving classification, categorization, and knowledge-based reasoning

criteria.name: Real-Time Data Dependency
criteria.question: Does the product require integration with real-time external data feeds, live sensors, or continuously updating operational systems?
criteria.quote: E0: tasks requiring access to real-time, frequently changing data that LLMs cannot directly access

criteria.name: Physical World Interaction
criteria.question: Does the product control, monitor, or interface with physical hardware, machinery, IoT devices, or physical infrastructure?
criteria.quote: E0: tasks that involve interaction with the physical world or require physical dexterity

criteria.name: Complex Human Judgment Requirement
criteria.question: Does the product support high-stakes decisions requiring professional judgment, regulatory compliance expertise, or fiduciary responsibility?
criteria.quote: Non-automatable tasks require complex judgment that cannot be separated from human expertise and accountability

criteria.name: Specialized Tool Integration
criteria.question: Does the product require deep integration with specialized proprietary tools, custom APIs, or domain-specific technical systems?
criteria.quote: E0: tasks requiring use of specialized tools or systems beyond LLM text processing capabilities

criteria.name: Real-Time Adaptive Response
criteria.question: Does the product require real-time adaptation to dynamic conditions such as live negotiations, trading, or emergency response coordination?
criteria.quote: Non-automatable tasks include those requiring real-time adaptation to rapidly changing circumstances
